results.name: caervelin
results.description: The tower of Gadwick, accidentally destroyed by his apprentice Johann.

results.name: camouflage
results.description: Patterning and/or coloration allowing a creature to blend into the terrain.

results.name: cannon fodder
results.description: Living things, usually Goblins, being used as live ammo.

results.name: cantrip
results.description: Cards which let you draw a card as they resolve or enter the battlefield

results.name: cap
results.description: Flat headgear, usually with a visor.

results.name: capenna angel
results.description: Angels from the plane of Capenna. Usually distinguishable by their stained glass halos

results.name: capenna angel (statue)
results.description: Capenna Angels sealed as statues around the plane
